title: Run Mastodon client API test suite
description: Run nileshtrivedi/activitypub-testsuite Insomnia collection against Broadside. 61 endpoints covering: instance metadata, accounts, statuses, timelines, notifications, search, lists, filters, tags, OAuth. Import collection into Insomnia, set env vars.
close_reason: N/A: Broadside has no Mastodon client API. No /api/v1/ endpoints exist to test against the Insomnia collection. Reopen if/when a Mastodon-compatible API layer is added.
